title: survival_service.ps1 does not expose Stage-2 flags (lottery/flatten/portfolio-kill)
why: survival_service.ps1 only exposes -Broker/-RiskInterval/-DryRun/-WithSleeve/-Interval; it has NO parameter for --lottery-arm/--lottery-event-time/--lottery-risk-frac, --portfolio-kill, --flatten-at, --flatten-mode. To pre-arm Stage 2 at the freeze the operator must hand-launch the long `uv run` from runbook §6.2 — neither .bat nor .ps1 supports it. Worse, -WithSleeve toggles the OLD trend-tilt sleeve (--with-sleeve), NOT the B0150 lottery sleeve, so it can give a false impression of Stage-2 coverage under pressure.
value_rationale: The 'official' service launcher cannot launch the frozen Stage-2 config; combined with B0176 this matters for a clean armed launch. Medium (a hand-launched uv command is a viable workaround, but error-prone at the freeze).
scope: Add pass-through params to survival_service.ps1 for the Stage-2 flags (or an -ExtraArgs passthrough).
Rename/clarify -WithSleeve so it is not confused with the lottery sleeve.
Verify the launched command matches runbook §6.2 verbatim.
recommendation: Add an -ExtraArgs string passthrough appended to the python argv; document the §6.2 armed command.

history.note: From hackathon code audit, findings A1/M2

history.reason: fix(hackathon): B0177 â€” run_loop resilience + lottery envelope latch tightening
survival_service.ps1: added -ExtraArgs passthrough for Stage-2 flags, clarified -WithSleeve is the trend-tilt sleeve (not lottery), Show-Status now tails the .err log where [ALARM] banners go (M1).
